messages.content:
перефразируй
This purple hair color moves into the wild side from a sun-kissed balayage to a metallic unicorn.

Created by hairstylist, Kimberly Marie says, “I love using these deeper violet colors because the hair doesn’t need to be lifted to a bright blonde before applying the color.”

If you are considering this pastel purple, remember the maintenance and proper at-home care. Colors like this are considered high-maintenance and can take several hours to achieve, depending on your current color history.

Unicorn hair is accepted more now than ever, giving women a chance to express themselves and have fun with their looks!

This vibrant purple hair color transitions from a natural sun-kissed balayage to a bold metallic unicorn hue.

According to hairstylist Kimberly Marie, she enjoys working with deeper violet shades as they do not require the hair to be lightened to a bright blonde beforehand.

When choosing a pastel purple, it is important to consider the upkeep and proper home care routine. These colors are high-maintenance and may require several hours to achieve, depending on your current hair color.

Unicorn hair is now widely embraced, allowing women to express themselves and experiment with their appearance in a fun and creative way.

перефразируй
Denim Blue & Dark Blue
Blue Jean & Midnight Blue

перефразируй
The dark and light colors of blue were created by hairstylist Albee Chan of Singapore.

“For the ombre/balayage technique, it’s recommended to do some styling like a wave or curl to increase the movement and dynamics of the hair,” says Chan.

She also wants you to understand that the hair needs to be bleached 1-2 rounds to achieve the color (especially Asian hair). Chan adds, “The damage caused by bleaching will make the hair drier or even cause breakage.”

The hairstylist Albee Chan from Singapore has expertly created a combination of light and dark shades of blue.

Chan recommends adding some waves or curls to hair styled with the ombre/balayage technique to enhance its movement and dimension.

It is important to note that in order to achieve this color, especially on Asian hair, the hair may need to be bleached 1-2 times. Chan emphasizes that the process of bleaching can cause damage, leading to dryness and potential breakage in the hair.

перефразируй
Blue, Green, and Purple Balayage
Balayage featuring Shades of Blue, Green, and Purple

перефразируй
This blue, green, and purple balayage was created by hair color specialist Kristinine Gibb of Canada.

“I loved creating these hues of green with blue-purple hair art. I chose to use yellow to give to create depth in key areas. These direct dyes allow for so much creativity,” she explains.

She adds, “In my experience, the young tend to like the very loud bright colors, whereas middle-aged women prefer deeper tones that are still very fun colors. For mature women, I find they tend to choose pastels, which is fantastic because they don’t typically last for very long, making it uncommitted fun.”

The talented hair color specialist Kristinine Gibb from Canada crafted a stunning balayage featuring a blend of blue, green, and purple hues.

Gibb expresses her passion for creating intricate shades of green paired with blue-purple hair art, using yellow tones strategically to add depth in specific areas. The use of direct dyes allows for endless creative possibilities.

Based on her observation, she notes that younger individuals often gravitate towards vibrant and bold colors, while middle-aged women prefer richer tones that still offer a fun and lively appearance. On the other hand, mature women tend to opt for pastel hues, which provide a temporary yet enjoyable pop of color.

перефразируй
Red, Purple, and Blue Hair
Hair featuring Shades of Red, Purple, and Blue

перефразируй
This red, purple, and blue hair was created by stylist Lucas Chew of Singapore.

“I always like to do advanced multi-color for my girls, which includes this kind of red-purple-blue galaxy hair color! It always gives women with dark hair a new look,” says Chew.

Stylist Lucas Chew from Singapore crafted this vibrant red, purple, and blue hair color.

Chew shares his preference for creating elaborate multi-color looks for his clients, such as this striking red-purple-blue galaxy hair color. He notes that this bold color combination can provide a fresh and unique look, particularly for women with dark hair.

перефразируй
Purple Hair with Blue Highlights
Hair featuring Purple with Blue Accentuating Streaks

перефразируй
Blue and purple hair ideas like this are very bold colors. Hairstylist Brianna Lynn of Lancaster, WI, says, “The curls show off the color variation a little better, but it can also be worn straight.”

She continues, “Chunky blues thrown into the beautiful purple tone show a little more dimension. I love how the colors complement each other and create an electrifying look. The blue highlights are just enough to create a color mesh.”

Vibrant blue and purple hair like this is daring and eye-catching. Hairstylist Brianna Lynn from Lancaster, WI, explains, “Curls can enhance the depth of color variation, but the style can also be worn sleek and straight.”

She adds, “The chunky blue highlights blended into the gorgeous purple base add an extra dimension. The harmonious blend of colors creates a striking and electrifying appearance. The touches of blue highlights perfectly complement the overall color scheme.”

перефразируй
Dark Purple and Bright Blue with Dark Roots
Rich Purple and Vibrant Blue with Deep Roots

перефразируй
Go for a custom-designed metallic blue-purple hair color.

When wearing blue and purple highlights, you should understand the importance of home hair care products and make time for color maintenance.

This look requires sulfate-free and paraben-free color-safe shampoo and conditioners to ensure the richness of the color remains as long as possible. Vivid colors such as these purple and blue hair ideas tend to wash out faster than permanent colors resulting in more frequent salon visits to keep it freshened up.

Opt for a personalized metallic blend of blue and purple hair color.

When incorporating blue and purple highlights, it is crucial to prioritize the use of quality hair care products at home and allocate time for color upkeep.

Select sulfate-free, paraben-free, color-safe shampoos, and conditioners to preserve the vibrancy of the color for an extended period. Intense shades like these blue and purple combinations may fade quicker than permanent colors, necessitating more frequent salon visits to maintain a fresh appearance.

перефразируй
Lilac and Silver Blue
Soft Lavender and Silvery Blue

перефразируй
This purple and silver hair color is the dark depth of the galaxy transition with the stars and the purple cosmic rays going throughout. It was created by balayage specialist and stylist Michael Bargallo of Chesapeake, VA.

“Creative coloring needs to be maintained every 6-8 weeks to keep the color refreshed,” says Bargallo. “You also have to consider the hair type and the condition of the hair! Always ask for a 2-year history of the hair to see if the hair can achieve the color the client wants.”

This combination of purple and silver hair evokes the deep, celestial depths of a galaxy, with stars and cosmic purple rays intertwined throughout. The stunning color was expertly crafted by balayage specialist and stylist Michael Bargallo from Chesapeake, VA.

"Maintaining creative coloring is essential, with touch-ups recommended every 6-8 weeks to keep the color looking vibrant," advises Bargallo. "It's important to take into account the hair type and condition. Requesting a 2-year history of the hair can help determine if the desired color can be achieved based on the hair's current state."

перефразируй
Pinkish Purple and Blue Hair Color
Hair Color with a Tint of Pink-purple and Blue

перефразируй
Pinkish purple, and blue hair color is a popular color palette in fashion hair colors. As the colors fade, they evolve in geoidal hue, making it a fun choice of hair color. For the best results, routined maintenance visits 4 weeks apart for root and color refreshes are suggested.

The combination of pinkish purple and blue hair color is a frequently seen color palette in fashion-forward hair styling. As these colors gradually fade, they transform into a mesmerizing blend of hues, adding an element of fun to the overall look. To maintain the vibrancy of this color fusion, it is recommended to schedule routine maintenance visits every 4 weeks for root touch-ups and color refreshes.
